h1.visual_description: All-caps, serif font, centered at the top of the page, serving as a running header.

h2.visual_description: Small-caps, serif font, used for figure labels and metadata descriptions.
h2.example_text: FIGURE 4.2 William Hogarth, Taste in High Life [graphic].

visual_matchers.pattern: Horizontal line separating main body text from bottom-aligned numerical list.
Indented block of text with slashes (/) used for line breaks.
Image with a right-aligned caption block containing small-caps metadata.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numerical superscript in-text mapping to a footer list with author, title (italicized), and publication details.

layout_info.primary_flow: multi-column (two-column layout for body text and footnotes)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running header at top left/center; Page number at top right (e.g., '73').
